sections.paragraph:
m. a hammer, Isa 41:7 Jerem. 23:29 . Metaph. Babylon, Jer 50:23, is called “the hammer (i.e. devastator) of the whole earth.” Root פָּטַשׁ.

פטיש

m. Chald., Dan 3:21 (where the קדי is פֶּטֶשׁ); i.q. Syr. ܦܶܛܫܐܳ a tunic, under garment. Hebr. translation כְּתנֶת. From the root פָּטָשׁ No. 2.
